sop.title: Receiving a PO in Fishbowl
sop.body:
## Purpose

Use this SOP when it is time to receive your PO from GS Purchase in Fishbowl

## Scope

For the person in charge of receiving and putting away new inventory

## Procedure

1. Go into your Purchase Order tab under Purchasing in Fishbowl
2. Click on the PO you wish to receive
3. Hit issue in the top Left corner of the screen
4. Select No when it asks if you want to send the email
5. Go into Receiving page
6. Click on the correct order
7. Click fulfill in the top left corner
8. From there input the Lot \# and Expiration date in for each product
9. Hit Finish once done
10. After Finished Navigate to Materials> Inventory 
11. Search up each product received
12. Move the correct quantity to the correct location as listed on the receiving sheet from the warehouse
13. Once everything is in the correct location you are done!

## Exceptions / Special Notes

New inventory that is added through a PO automatically gets placed in Main-Receiving and will need to be moved to the correct location.
